name: godaudits
description: Audit everything after anything. A single-command AI agent skill that audits an existing codebase end to end and emits a master audit report (AUDIT.mdx) with per-domain scores, evidence-backed findings, and an agent-executable remediation plan.
author: aihxp (https://github.com/aihxp)

scripts.postpack: echo 'Install the skill with: sh install.sh (or npx skills add aihxp/godaudits)'
